tool.name: whois_lookup
tool.description: Perform WHOIS lookups for domain information gathering.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Full WHOIS lookup with all available information - Get registrar and nameserver information - Get registration, update, and expiry dates - Check privacy protection status

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The lookup action: - lookup: Full WHOIS lookup with all available information - registrar: Get registrar and nameserver information - dates: Get registration, update, and expiry dates

returns.description: WHOIS information including registration details and dates

tool.examples:
# Full WHOIS lookup
lookup example.com
# Get registrar info
registrar example.com
# Get dates
dates example.com
